item.title: Building AI-Powered Infrastructure Monitoring: From Home Lab to Cloud Production
item.author: Matt Pollock
item.description: A comprehensive guide to integrating AI into infrastructure monitoring using Prometheus, Grafana, n8n, and Azure OpenAI. Learn to transform traditional alerts into intelligent business insights through hands-on home lab experimentation.

item.title: First Steps into AI Automation: My Journey from Trial to Self-Hosted Chaos
item.author: Matt Pollock
item.description: A real-world walkthrough of experimenting with n8n, Ollama, and OpenWebUI - complete with the inevitable OAuth headaches and Docker container migrations.

item.title: Bringing Patch Management In-House: Migrating from MSP to Azure Update Manager
item.author: Matt Pollock
item.description: A real-world walkthrough of migrating VM patching from a third-party provider to Azure Update Manager using PowerShell, tagging, and policy automation.

item.title: Azure BCDR Review – Turning Inherited Cloud Infrastructure into a Resilient Recovery Strategy
item.author: matthew
item.description: A high-level walkthrough of how to assess and formalise a business continuity and disaster recovery (BCDR) posture in Azure, following an inherited landing zone handover.

item.title: Azure BCDR – How I Turned a DR Review into a Strategic Recovery Plan
item.author: matthew
item.description: Part 2 of a real-world Azure BCDR journey: how I transformed a discovery-led review into a structured recovery plan with prioritised actions and stakeholder alignment.

item.title: Saving Azure Costs with Scheduled VM Start/Stop using Custom Azure Automation Runbooks
item.author: matthew
item.description: Implement cost-saving automation in Azure using lightweight, tag-driven runbooks to start and stop virtual machines on a daily schedule. This post walks through an end-to-end setup using Azure Automation and PowerShell.

item.title: Enforcing Time Zone and DST Compliance on Windows Servers Using GPO and Scheduled Tasks
item.author: matthew
item.description: Ensure consistent GMT Standard Time configuration and Daylight Saving Time (DST) handling across domain-joined Windows Servers using a scheduled task GPO approach. Includes auditing and remediation scripts for enterprise environments.

item.title: Configuring UK Regional Settings on Windows Servers with PowerShell
item.author: matthew
item.description: A PowerShell-based guide to applying consistent UK regional settings to Windows Server systems, especially in cloud or automated environments.

item.title: Replacing SAS Tokens with User Assigned Managed Identity (UAMI) in AzCopy for Blob Uploads
item.author: matthew
item.description: A step-by-step guide to replacing AzCopy SAS token authentication with User Assigned Managed Identity (UAMI) for uploading files to Azure Blob Storage.

item.title: Replacing SQL Credentials with User Assigned Managed Identity (UAMI) in Azure SQL Managed Instance
item.author: matthew
item.description: A step-by-step guide to replacing hardcoded SQL credentials with User Assigned Managed Identity (UAMI) authentication in Azure SQL Managed Instance.

item.title: Cloud Resume Challenge with Terraform: Final Reflections & Future Directions
item.author: matthew
item.description: Reflecting on lessons learned from the Cloud Resume Challenge, exploring next steps, and discussing how the skills gained apply to real-world cloud engineering roles.

item.title: Cloud Resume Challenge with Terraform: Automating Deployments with GitHub Actions
item.author: matthew
item.description: Setting up GitHub Actions for CI/CD automation of Terraform deployments to AWS.

item.title: Cloud Resume Challenge with Terraform: Building the Backend API
item.author: matthew
item.description: Creating a serverless API with AWS Lambda, API Gateway, and DynamoDB using Terraform.

item.title: Cloud Resume Challenge with Terraform: Deploying the Static Website
item.author: matthew
item.description: Using Terraform to deploy a static website on AWS with S3, CloudFront, Route 53, and SSL encryption.

item.title: Cloud Resume Challenge with Terraform: Introduction & Setup
item.author: matthew
item.description: An introduction to the Cloud Resume Challenge and how to set up Terraform for AWS infrastructure as code.

item.title: Monitoring an IIS-Based Web Farm with Azure Application Insights
item.author: matthew
item.description: A step-by-step guide to setting up and configuring Azure Application Insights for IIS-based web farms.

item.title: Uninstalling PaperCut MF Client via Intune – A Step-by-Step Guide
item.author: matthew
item.description: A guide to unistalling software using Powershell and Intune

item.title: How I used ChatGPT to create AZ-400 exam prep notes from MSLearn
item.author: matthew
item.description: My experience using AI and GitHub to streamline study notes for Microsoft certification exams.

item.title: GitOps Project: Automating AWS infrastructure deployment with Terraform and GitHub Actions
item.author: matthew
derek
andrew
item.description: Step-by-step guide on setting up a GitOps pipeline using Terraform, AWS, and GitHub Actions.

item.title: Customizing Your MkDocs Blog
item.author: matthew
team
squidfunk
james
item.description: Enhance your MkDocs blog with themes, plugins, and customization options.
